case_title: JACQUELINE M. JAY VS. MIA E. ANTE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE ON SUBPOENA AND DECLARATION FOR DEFENDANT MIA ANTE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAY, JACQUELINE M. AS TO DEFENDANT ANTE, MIA E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAY, JACQUELINE M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTE, MIA E. $956.05 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,021.05, STATUTORY DAMAGES($400.00) ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF FOR DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH VIOLATION OF CC 1950.5. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR JUDICIAL SIGNATURE. AS TO DEFENDANT ANTE, MIA E.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO MIA E. ANTE

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-16-2012 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-02-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IN NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR ANTICIPATES RECEIVING SOME AID VIA HER PREGNANCY & CHILDBIRTH AT END OF MAY AND HAS OFFERED TO MAKE A PARTIAL PAYMENT TO JUDGEMENT CREDITOR", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
